title: Xero - Monday.com Zapier Subitem issue

posts.author: JesseSandhu (Jesse Sandhu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!

I’m quite new to using both Monday.com (loving it so far, it’s transforming my team) and Zapier, but I’m having an issue that I’ve seen previously in another form.

The issue is the subitem says that there is information, with a little number next to the text on the item line, but when you expand the item, the subitem is empty.

image775×189 13.5 KB

I’ve seen this before in a slightly different way, when I’ve downloaded templates, and it will say something like, “click here to read how to use me”. It has the number 1 in the comment box. You click on the comment box and it’s empty.

Anybody know what’s going on?

Sorry if I’m posting in the wrong location, just let me know and I’ll move.

posts.author: JesseSandhu (Jesse Sandhu)
posts.cookedHtml: Here’s my Zap that I’m trying to do:

posts.cookedHtml:

It worked fine, it just took a couple of hours to load
